Who I am
About me

I am an AI-Powered Marketing and Operations Assistant with a strong background in designing high-converting websites, lead generation, and executive support. I leverage AI tools to automate workflows and improve business efficiency.

As a former Head of Recruitment, I bring experience in talent sourcing, screening, and onboarding, making me a well-rounded professional who understands both business development and people operations.
